module.description: Versioned API platform with token management, route catalog, workflow operations and version restore endpoints.
module.permission_description: Inspect the versioned API catalog and manage bearer tokens.
module.navigation_hint: API v1 catalog, tokens and operational framework endpoints.

index.title: API Management
index.description: Versioned API v1 integrated with real auth, runtime permissions, formal catalog, workflows and operational version restore.

created_token.title: New token
created_token.description: Copy it now. The persisted hash replaces the plain value and it will not be shown again.

form.card_description: Real token over active users of the current system.

identity.title: Token identity
identity.description: Create a real bearer token linked to an active user of the runtime.

help.abilities: Informational scopes persisted with the token. Use * for unrestricted scope metadata.
help.expires_at: Optional UTC/local datetime accepted by strtotime(). Leave blank for non-expiring tokens.

tokens.title: Active tokens
tokens.description: Current inventory with explicit revocation and traceability by last use.

messages.created: API token created. Copy it now; it will not be shown again.

validation.abilities_required: Provide at least one ability or use *.
validation.expires_at_invalid: Provide a valid expiration datetime or leave it blank.
